name: My-Anbennar Sheriff
description: Lane-aware prompt injection + deterministic modding tools for My-Anbennar EU4 modding pipeline. Enforces conflict-hotspot policy, canonical/legacy registry, and pre-PR gate.

enforceHotspots.description: Warn when changes touch single-writer hotspot files

enforceLegacyNoExtend.description: Fail preflight if a Legacy (do not extend) file is edited
